citation: Raue et al. Structural and practical identifiability analysis of partially observed dynamical models by exploiting the profile likelihood. Bioinformatics 25, 1923–1929.

citation: Gutenkunst et al. Universally sloppy parameter sensitivities in systems biology models. PLOS Computational Biology 3, e189.
paper_a_implication: Supports broad compensation directions but does not make sloppiness synonymous with non-identifiability.

citation: Browning et al. Structural identifiability analysis of linear reaction–advection–diffusion processes in mathematical biology. Proceedings of the Royal Society A 480, 20230911.
paper_a_implication: Supports care in separating structural from practical claims in transport models.
